_comment: Manual minutes overrides per blueprint §6.1. Add records here to override model-projected minutes for a specific player on a specific date. Overrides are validated (minutes in [0, 48]), expire on game_date, and trigger UTM redistribution of the delta.

overrides.reason: Minutes model predicts 11.8 min due to zero_minute_flag from recent game row; season avg=31.4, L10 avg=35.6 — restoring to season average
